title: dolomiaea scabrida
intro: Dolomiaea scabrida, also known as the rough-hairy dolomiaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolomiaea scabrida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
